payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE. Per-project actor aliases: tenant_aliases table (first-come per board - no global squatting), claim/list/remove API on /api/projects/:id/aliases (self-claim >=member, reassign/force owner-only, 409 ALIAS_TAKEN on conflict), and sync-push authz now accepts actor IN ({account} UNION claimed aliases). CLI: scope alias claim/list/remove. Verified e2e: push of local history stamped bri fails 403 before claim, lands 200 after; another member cannot claim or push the same name.
